name: sniper-bot
description: Solana Sniper Bot — GMGN-powered signal scraper, auto-buy, and web dashboard

scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (!process.env.CI) { try { fs.writeFileSync('.git/hooks/pre-push', fs.readFileSync('.husky/pre-push')); fs.chmodSync('.git/hooks/pre-push', 0o755); console.log('Pre-push hook installed'); } catch(e) { console.log('Pre-push hook skipped:', e.message); } }"
